thought.text: 我将检查 ANTLR 语法和 AST 转换代码。

action.command:
printf '%s
' '--- antlr CMake ---'; sed -n '1,180p' /workspace/YatCC/task/2/antlr/CMakeLists.txt; printf '%s
' '--- parser grammar ---'; sed -n '1,320p' /workspace/YatCC/task/2/antlr/SYsUParser.g4; printf '%s
' '--- Ast2Asg hpp ---'; sed -n '1,240p' /workspace/YatCC/task/2/antlr/Ast2Asg.hpp; printf '%s
' '--- Ast2Asg cpp 1 ---'; sed -n '1,360p' /workspace/YatCC/task/2/antlr/Ast2Asg.cpp

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "printf '%s\\n' '--- antlr CMake ---'; sed -n '1,180p' /workspace/YatCC/task/2/antlr/CMakeLists.txt; printf '%s\\n' '--- parser grammar ---'; sed -n '1,320p' /workspace/YatCC/task/2/antlr/SYsUParser.g4; printf '%s\\n' '--- Ast2Asg hpp ---'; sed -n '1,240p' /workspace/YatCC/task/2/antlr/Ast2Asg.hpp; printf '%s\\n' '--- Ast2Asg cpp 1 ---'; sed -n '1,360p' /workspace/YatCC/task/2/antlr/Ast2Asg.cpp", "timeout": 120, "security_risk": "LOW", "summary": "Read ANTLR parser grammar and AST conversion"}

summary: Read ANTLR parser grammar and AST conversion
